Website Redesign

From Outdated to Outstanding

Transform your old, slow website into a modern, fast, high-converting site — without losing your Google rankings.

Redesign My Site Free Site Review
What Changes

A Website That Finally Works

Modern Look

A fresh, current design that builds instant credibility.

Faster Speed

Rebuilt for performance — no more slow, clunky pages.

Mobile-First

Perfect on every device, where most visitors are today.

Higher Conversions

Clear structure and CTAs that turn visitors into customers.

SEO Preserved

Rankings kept safe with proper redirects and migration.

Easy to Manage

A clean CMS so you can update content effortlessly.

Our Process

How We Build

01

Audit The Old Site

We benchmark your current Core Web Vitals, crawl every URL and study heatmaps to pinpoint exactly where visitors drop off.

02

Rearchitect For Conversion

New sitemap, sharper messaging and wireframes that push offers, proof and CTAs above the fold instead of burying them.

03

Rebuild Lean & Fast

A ground-up mobile-first build with compressed media, lazy loading and clean code — no bloated legacy themes or plugin sprawl.

04

Migrate & Measure

We map 301 redirects for every old URL, launch without ranking loss, then track conversion lift and tune what the data shows.

Tech Stack

Built With Modern Tech

ReactNext.jsWordPressTailwind CSSCore Web VitalsCloudflare CDNWebP / AVIFGoogle Analytics 4HotjarScreaming Frog
Why Us

Why Businesses Choose Us

Speed Is The Priority

We rebuild for sub-2-second loads, because every extra second of wait quietly costs you paying customers.

Rankings Stay Safe

A full URL map and 301 redirect plan means your hard-won Google positions survive the move intact.

Designed To Convert

Every page is restructured around one clear action, so the new site earns leads instead of just looking prettier.

Live In Weeks, Not Months

Fixed milestones and weekly demos get most redesigns launched in 2–5 weeks with zero guesswork.

Question & Answer

Frequently Asked Questions

Real questions clients ask about website redesign before getting started.

If it looks dated, loads slowly, isn't mobile-friendly, or isn't converting — a redesign modernises it and boosts results.

No — we preserve SEO, set up proper redirects and migrate content carefully so rankings stay safe and often improve.

Typically 2–5 weeks depending on size — with a clear plan and milestones shared upfront.

Yes — we retain and improve your existing content, or refresh it as part of the redesign.

That's the goal — modern design, faster speed and clear CTAs are proven to lift conversions.
